description: Style Notegliders, your go-brand, comes up with new season updates in it's casual shoes you're bound to love. This colour block sneaker considers three colours in perfect balance. Style this with a pair of denims and a monochrome printed tee to go with one of the overlay colours!Product Details Round toed black casual shoe with perforation styling all over and blue and yellow central overlaysHas a padded tongue and inner with central lace-upsTPU outsole moulded onto the heel to act as a heel guardBlack outsole with circular nubs all over, star shaped lugs at the forefoot and upraised lugs at the heelMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust, grime or dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
